nodes.label: Hybrid Tool Search (findTool)
nodes.rationale: Mandatory lexical relevance signal combined with optional semantic relevance signal fused by Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) over the persistent catalog. The semantic ranking is produced by the embedding sidecar. RRF is rank-based; no_good_match is gated on the underlying component scores (lexical relevance OR semantic similarity), not on RRF alone. Decisions: use / choose_from_candidates / known_but_unavailable / no_good_match / ambiguous / catalog_empty. findTool ranks tools from the persistent catalog even when downstream servers are unreachable, marking results with catalog freshness. Graceful degradation: returns a lexical-ranked decision when semantic is disabled, sidecar unavailable, or a query times out.

edges.source_location: Hybrid ranking — semantic ranking SHALL be produced by the embedding sidecar
